# Workout Log — Mesocycle 1

Started Wed Apr 22, 2026 · 4-week block · Hevy is primary log; this is the narrative record + issue tracker.

## Session 1 — Wed Apr 22 — Workout A (Home Gym, USA)

**Status:** Partial — finished through lat pulldown + lateral raises; ran out of time/energy on accessories. EZ-bar curl skipped (not done — do not log). Triceps extension caused elbow/tendon strain — flagged for swap.

| Exercise | Prescribed | Actual | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| Incline DB Bench | 3×8 @ 30, RIR 3 | 3×8 @ 30 lb | Light right shoulder popping, no pain. Felt right. |
| Chest-Supported DB Row | 3×8 @ 35, RIR 3 | 3×8 @ 35 lb | Challenging, RIR 1-2. Left stronger than right. |
| BB Back Squat | 3×8 @ 95, RIR 3 | 3×8 @ 95 lb | Left knee 2/10, inner thigh tightness. Enjoyed it. |
| Lat Pulldown (neutral) | 3×10 @ 90, RIR 3 | 3×10 @ 90 lb | — |
| DB Lateral Raise | 3×15 @ 10, RIR 2 | 3×15 @ 9 lb | — |
| EZ-Bar Curl | 2×10 @ 40, RIR 2 | — (skipped) | Did not perform. |
| Overhead DB Triceps Ext | 2×12 @ 25, RIR 2 | 1×12 @ 24 lb, 1×10 @ 20 lb | Elbow / tendon strain. Bad. → SWAP to pushdown. |
| Standing Calf Raise | 2×15 @ 25, RIR 2 | — (skipped) | Out of time. |
| DB Romanian Deadlift | 2×10 @ 35, RIR 3 | — (deferred) | Pushed to next day. |
| Hanging Leg Raise | 2×10 BW, RIR 2 | — (deferred) | Pushed to next day. |

## Thu Apr 23 — Carryover

Attempted to clear deferred work from Session 1. Got 1 set of DB RDL only — busy with kid stuff. Calf raise + hanging leg raise carried unfinished into the week.

| Exercise | Done | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| DB Romanian Deadlift | 1×10 @ 35 lb | Only one set; ran out of time. |

## Fri Apr 24 — Missed Session

Workout B not performed (work). Traveled to UK that night.

## Session 2 — Sat Apr 25 — Workout B (UK Travel Gym)

Equipment available: DBs to 22kg only, no barbell, no traditional cables (Technogym Kinesis dual-cable functional trainer with 1-20 levels), Technogym selectorized leg ext/curl machine, KBs (8/12/16kg). No pull-up bar.

**Adaptations applied:**
- BB shoulder press → DB shoulder press (already DB, just kg conversion)
- BB RDL → DB RDL (no barbell, dropped to 16kg max)
- Lat pulldown / face pull / triceps pushdown → Kinesis equivalents
- DB Reverse Lunge → Heel-Elevated Goblet Squat (lunges hurt knees — permanent swap)
- Added Leg Extension to compensate for missing barbell squat work
- Overhead DB Triceps Ext → Triceps Pushdown (continuation of the red-flag swap from Session 1)

| Exercise | Prescribed (orig) | Actual | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| DB Shoulder Press (neutral) | 3×8 @ 25 lb, RIR 3 | 3×8 @ 10 kg (~22 lb) | Conservative load, felt right. |
| DB RDL (sub for BB RDL) | 3×8 @ 95 lb BB, RIR 3 | 2×10 @ 16 kg (~35 lb/hand) | Capped by 22kg DB ceiling. |
| Kinesis Lat Pulldown | 3×8 @ 90 lb, RIR 3 | 3×8 @ level 12 | Not directly comparable to lb. |
| Flat DB Bench | 3×10 @ 35 lb, RIR 3 | 3×10 @ 16 kg (~35 lb/hand) | Top of rep range — try 17.5 kg next B. |
| Goblet Squat (heel-elev) | sub for Reverse Lunge | 2×12 @ 16 kg DB | No knee pain. Good. |
| Leg Extension (selectorized) | added for quad volume | 2×12 @ 20 kg | Probed up from 10/15. No knee pain. |
| Kinesis Face Pull | 3×15 @ 30 lb, RIR 2 | 3×12 @ level 4 | Reps short; bump to 15 next time. |
| DB Lateral Raise | 2×15 @ 10 lb, RIR 2 | 2×12 @ 4 kg (~9 lb) | Reps short of 15. |
| DB Hammer Curl | 2×10 @ 20 lb, RIR 2 | 2×10 @ 10 kg (~22 lb) | — |
| Kinesis Triceps Pushdown | sub for OH Triceps Ext | 2×12 @ level 2 | **Elbow felt fine.** Keep pushdown. |
| Standing Calf Raise | 2×15 @ 25 lb, RIR 2 | — (deferred) | Out of time. |
| Lying Leg Raise | 2×12 BW, RIR 2 | — (deferred) | Out of time. |

Hevy: hevy.com/workout/gdejrKKnXpE

## Session 3 — Mon Apr 27 — Workout A (1 day late)

**Status:** Partial — completed upper body + lat pulldown + accessories. **Lower body fully skipped due to lower back pain** (2/10 going in from BB squat 5 days prior, climbed to 3/10 mid-session). Calves skipped — dropped from program (see Active Issues). Hanging leg raise skipped (back).

Notable: prescribed weights/reps were all easy. RIR ran 4-5 across most lifts vs prescribed 3 — typical week 1 conservatism, room to push next A.

| Exercise | Prescribed | Actual | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| Incline DB Bench | 3×8 @ 30, RIR 3 | 3×8 @ 30 lb | "Easy. RIR probably 5." → bump to 35 next A. |
| Chest-Supported DB Row | 3×8 @ 35, RIR 3 | 3×8 @ 35 lb | "Not very difficult, RIR 3-3.5." Hold at 35, push reps. |
| BB Back Squat | 3×8 @ 95, RIR 3 | — (skipped) | Lower back pain still present; not loading the spine today. |
| Lat Pulldown (neutral) | 3×10 @ 90, RIR 3 | 3×10 @ 90 lb | "Fine. Good weight, no issues." |
| DB Romanian Deadlift | 2×10 @ 35, RIR 3 | — (skipped) | Hip hinge with irritated back — too risky. |
| DB Lateral Raise | 3×15 @ 10, RIR 2 | 3×15 @ 9 lb | "RIR 4-5. Feels good on joints." → push reps to 18-20 before adding weight. |
| DB Curl (sub for EZ-Bar) | 2×10 @ 40 EZ, RIR 2 | 2×10 @ 18 lb | EZ-bar swapped to DB curl — easier setup. Easy at 18. → 22-25 lb next A. |
| Triceps Pushdown | 2×12 @ 25, RIR 2 | 1×12 @ 25, 1×12 @ 20 | "Hard on elbows." Yellow flag — try 20 lb + slow eccentric next session. |
| Standing Calf Raise | 2×15 @ 25, RIR 2 | — (skipped) | Dropped from program. |
| Hanging Leg Raise | 2×10 BW, RIR 2 | — (skipped) | Back. |

Hevy: hevy.com/workout/9hTZAXufNiY

## Session 4 — Wed Apr 29 — Workout B

**Status:** Partial — 4 main compounds completed at high quality. Accessories (goblet squat, face pull, lateral raise, hammer curl, triceps pushdown) cut for time/energy. Strong session despite the cut.

Lower back: 0-1/10 going in, zero discomfort during BB RDL — back issue appears isolated to BB Squat, not general spine.

| Exercise | Prescribed | Actual | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| Seated DB Shoulder Press (neutral) | 3×8 @ 30, RIR 2 | 3×8 @ 30 lb | All-time PR. Difficult — likely RIR 0-1. Hold 30, push reps next B. |
| Barbell RDL | 3×8 @ 105, RIR 2 | 3×8 @ 105 lb | Zero back discomfort. Clean hinge. RDL stays in. |
| Lat Pulldown | 3×12 @ 90, RIR 2 (revised mid-session from 3×8 @ 95) | 3×12 @ 90 lb | Earned progression after 4 sessions @ 3×10 @ 90. Push to 15 next, then 100. |
| Flat DB Bench | 3×10 @ 40, RIR 2 | 3×10 @ 40 lb | Set 2 reps 9-10 grinders, rested 4 min for set 3, last rep grind. Closer to RIR 0-1. Hold 40. |
| Heel-Elev Goblet Squat | 2×12 @ 40-50, RIR 2 | — (skipped) | Time/energy. Optional pickup Thu. |
| Cable Face Pull | 3×15 @ 40, RIR 2 | — (skipped) | — |
| DB Lateral Raise | 2×15 @ 10, RIR 1 | — (skipped) | — |
| DB Hammer Curl | 2×10 @ 25, RIR 2 | — (skipped) | — |
| Triceps Pushdown | 2×12 @ 20, RIR 2 | — (skipped) | Pushdown elbow re-test deferred to Session 5. |

## Active Issues & Decisions

| Item | Status | Action |
|---|---|---|
| Triceps Overhead Ext → tendon/elbow strain | Confirmed bad. Pushdown tested clean Session 2. | Swap to Triceps Pushdown for rest of Mesocycle 1. Revisit OH ext in Mesocycle 2. |
| Triceps Pushdown → "hard on elbows" Session 3 | Yellow flag. Re-test deferred to Session 5 (skipped Session 4). | Session 5: 20 lb across both sets, 3-sec eccentric, elbows pinned, no aggressive lockout. If still cranky, swap. |
| Reverse Lunge → knee pain | Confirmed. | Permanent swap to Heel-Elevated Goblet Squat. |
| Right shoulder popping (Incline DB Bench) | Low — no pain, just sound. | Monitor. Keep elbows at 45°. No action unless pain develops. |
| Left knee 2/10 during BB Back Squat | Mild, returning-lifter normal. | Monitor. Stay to parallel, slow eccentric. |
| **Lower back 2-3/10 post BB Squat (Sessions 1 → 3)** | **Cleared by Session 4. Zero discomfort during BB RDL @ 105 — issue appears isolated to BB Back Squat, not general spine.** | **First BB Squat back in (Session 5) is the real test. If clean, BB Squat stays. If pain returns, permanent demotion to goblet squat in Mesocycle 2.** |
| Leg extension as quad accessory | Trialed, well-tolerated. | Optional addition when squat volume is low (e.g. travel weeks, back issues). |
| EZ-Bar Curl → DB Curl | Equipment preference (EZ bar a pain to load). | Permanent swap. |
| Calves — no motivation | Brian doesn't care about calves. | Permanent removal from program. Add back later if interest develops. |

## Volume vs Target (rough, through Apr 30)

| Muscle | Target (end of wk 3) | Actual through Apr 30 | Note |
|---|---|---|---|
| Chest | 10-12 sets | 12 sets | On target. |
| Back | 12-14 sets | 18 sets | Ahead — high-quality pulldown + row volume. |
| Quads | 8-10 sets | 7 sets | Behind. Goblet squat skipped Apr 30. Pick up Session 5. |
| Hamstrings | 6-9 sets | 8 sets | On target — RDL @ 105 was solid. |
| Side delts | 8-10 sets | 10 sets | On target. Apr 30 lateral raises closed the gap. |
| Rear delts | 3-6 sets | 3 sets | Behind. Skipped Apr 30 face pulls. |
| Biceps | 6-8 sets | 6 sets | On target. Apr 30 hammer curls closed the gap. |
| Triceps | 6-8 sets | 6 sets | On target. |
| Abs | 4-6 sets | 0 sets | Skipped all sessions. |

Sessions 5-9 will close most gaps naturally — not chasing missed volume.
